name: Coral Futures Institute
description: Nonprofit marine conservation organization dedicated to reef research, community monitoring, and coral restoration in Hawaiʻi

name: Pacific Marine Science Consortium
description: Annual symposia and workshops connecting marine scientists across the Pacific region

name: Reef Guardians Alliance
description: Volunteer-driven coral reef protection and community education programs

name: Hawaiʻi Marine Policy Forum
description: Connecting researchers, policymakers, and community stakeholders on marine protected area issues

name: NOAA Pacific Islands Fisheries Science Center
description: Federal research center hosting workshops on Pacific fisheries, coral reef monitoring, and climate impacts

name: Seaview Graduate Institute
description: Honolulu-based graduate research institute hosting public lectures and symposia in marine and conservation science

name: UH Mānoa Marine Sciences Department
description: University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa department organising public seminars, reef workshops, and field training events

name: Kailua Community Coalition
description: Neighbourhood nonprofit organising beach stewardship, coastal clean-ups, and reef-awareness events in Kailua
